grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Covers governance & organisation, risk management, information security, training & development, and file & case management - though client care is not explicitly mentioned as a separate section

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Mentions multiple specific evidence types including training records, SRO documentation, written procedures, AML policy, PI insurance certificate, and file audit evidence

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 'designated CQS Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) with documented responsibilities'

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: States 'written procedures for adopting and monitoring CQS protocol compliance' and 'evidence of regular reviews of your firm's compliance with CQS standards'

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Dedicated Information Security section covering cyber security policy, staff training on cyber risks, secure communications, and Cyber Essentials certification

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: File & Case Management section covers standardised file/case management system, key dates monitoring, file storage/retention policy, and regular file audits
